proposal.working_title: AI Operations Dashboards Explained: How Mid-Market Operators Turn Agent Telemetry Into Decisions
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AI dashboards drown ops leaders in vanity metrics; this post lays out the 3-layer dashboard stack mid-market operators use to turn raw agent telemetry into approve, reject, or escalate calls executives actually trust.
outline_bullets: What an AI Operations Dashboard Tracks That a Marketing Dashboard Doesn't
The 3-Layer Stack: Pipeline Health, Decision Quality, Business Outcomes
Build vs Buy: When a No-Code Stack Beats a Custom BI Dashboard for Operators
